action.description: What the character says/does. This is visible to the GM and, if performed in front of the other character, to the other player too.

private_reasoning.description: Why the character is doing this, based ONLY on what this character currently knows/believes. Never shown to the other player. Used by God to check for leaked knowledge.

check_requested.description: Optional: if the action plausibly requires a roll, name the skill. The orchestrator decides whether a check actually applies.
